prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-135CKWDSAH-135-555 Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 13.5" Collector's Hunting Knife with Dragon Scabbard and Handle Description: Are you a fantasy and adventure enthusiast with a knack for collecting interesting knives and blades? Then this ASR Outdoor Dragon Fantasy Dagger is the perfect addition to your collection. Its unique design is sure to catch the eye - it features an intricate dragon head pommel as well as a majestic dragon scene straight out of your favorite fantasy novel, movie or video game on the handle as well as the matching white sheath designed to protect the blade while on display.
Although this knife is meant for displays and collections, you can absolutely use it if you so choose. The knife is designed to be utilitarian, versatile and effective at both slicing and stabbing, making this a favorite of outdoorsmen and hunters looking for an all-in-one knife. Its curved top clip bevel may be used to remove the skin from a carcass, while the straight portion of the blade edge toward the guard can be used for cutting meat.
The 7" blade itself is constructed of durable 440 stainless steel with a traditional Damascus-style etching that won't rust, so you can count on it rain or shine. The blade is fixed so it wont wobble come loose even after many uses. The overall length of the knife with the sheath in place is 13.5", making it a great size for a display case but can also easily fit inside of a backpack or bag. The ergonomic handle will prevent slippage during use, and it has both a guard and front quillon to protect your hand.
Whether you're displaying your enthusiasm for fantastical creatures or going on your very own quest, this Dragon Head Fantasy Dagger Knife is a one-of-a-kind addition to your knife collection. Search Terms: fantasy dragon dagger knife collector gift set avid collectors collectible knives daggers animal dagger hilted authentic steel blade outdoorsman dragon scabbard hunting knife with sheath Features: - 7" Acid Etched Stainless Steel Blade - Etched Dragon Head Handle - Dragon Design on the Scabbard and Handle - 13.5" Overall Length === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 13.5 in Dragon Fantasy Hunting Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: 7 Inch Stainless Steel Blade, Dragon Head Pommel, Matching Scabbard, Fixed Blade, Collector Grade

openai.title_differentiation: 7" Acid-Etched Stainless Steel Blade, Dragon Head Handle, Matching Scabbard, Fixed Blade, 135" Overall Length
